Let $S = \{2, 4, 8, 16, 32\}$. Fill in the blanks, assuming that all sets are sets of natural numbers:

(a). $S = \{4, 4, 2, 16, 32, 2, 4, \smallblank\}$

(b). $S \subset \{2n: 1 \leq n < \smallblank\}$

(c). $\{n: 1\leq n\leq 5\} = \{\largeblank: n\in S\}$

(d). $S = \{\largeblank: 1\leq n \leq 5\}$
